Body.Content:
We are announcing Microsoft 365 Copilot chat for model-driven apps in Power Apps. This feature is now available for public preview.

How does this affect me?
This feature introduces an AI assistant that enables users to understand the data in your apps by engaging in natural language conversations. It also provides access to the full capabilities of Microsoft 365 Copilot directly within an app, including any agent available to them in Microsoft 365 Copilot chat.

The interface allows administrators to manage the availability of Microsoft 365 Copilot chat in model-driven Power Apps for users. Administrators can choose to disable this feature, even if the app creator has already activated this feature within their app.

What do I need to do to prepare?
This message is for awareness, and no action is required.

If you would like more information on this feature, please visit Add Microsoft 365 Copilot chat for app users in model-driven apps.

message.Title: Power Apps - Public preview for Microsoft 365 Copilot chat in model-driven apps
